rules

PREGUNTAS:
1. What temperature fluctuations are allowed in the project room when the air conditioning is on, and what additional rule must be observed regarding windows during this time?

2. If I leave my tupperware in the office canteen, what specific consequence should I expect on a daily basis, and how does this policy differ from the fridge clean-up process?

3. Can you clarify the rules surrounding meal consumption within the office in relation to the designated areas outlined in the fragment?
---
9
Ofﬁce Rules
Canteen
﹣
Leave your seat clean and tidy when you ﬁnish.
﹣
Always use the dishwasher —but no tupperwares
﹣
Fridges are cleaned on Mondays at 08:00. Anything left behind will be 
removed.
﹣
Daily at 08:00, we will dispose of any tuppers left behind.
Project Room
﹣
Keep noise down
﹣
Even temperature in A/C (+/-1ºC)
﹣
Windows closed if A/C is on
﹣
Meals in the canteen only

PREGUNTAS:
1. ¿Cuál es el procedimiento para reservar una Sala de Reuniones (MR) o una Cabina Telefónica (PB) en la empresa?
   
2. ¿Cuál es la recomendación sobre el uso de las ventanas y el sistema de ventilación en las cabinas telefónicas?

3. ¿Qué acciones se deben tomar al finalizar el uso de una Sala de Reuniones o una Cabina Telefónica para asegurar que quede en condiciones adecuadas para el siguiente usuario?
---
10
Meeting Rooms & Phone Booths
� Book your MR or PB through Rooms in your Google Calendar.
� Always be punctual! If you´re late, you will make your colleague 
be late too.
� When you ﬁnish, leave them tidy and clear all whiteboards and 
ﬂipcharts.
� Close the windows before you leave.
� If using a Phone Booth, please note that an internal ventilation 
system is always on, so please keep the door closed and do not 
leave it open when you ﬁnish.

Health & Safety

PREGUNTAS:
1. ¿Qué leyes y regulaciones de salud y seguridad necesitan cumplir los empleados en el entorno de teletrabajo según el fragmento proporcionado?
   
2. ¿Cuáles son las responsabilidades de un empleado respecto a las medidas de protección contra incendios bajo la Ley española de Prevención de Riesgos Ocupacionales mencionada en el texto?

3. ¿Qué se espera de los empleados en cuanto a autoevaluaciones en el entorno de teletrabajo para garantizar su bienestar en el trabajo según este fragmento?
---
17
Health and Safety
Spanish Occupational Risk Prevention Law
It is our duty to ensure, so far as is reasonably practicable, your 
health, safety and welfare at work. 
It is the responsibility of the employee to cooperate with the 
employer and colleagues to comply with health and safety laws 
and regulations, i.e. Prevention Measures, Telework and new 
TIC’s, Fire Protection measures, Emergency Measures, First Aid 
and Auto Evaluation at Telework.

PREGUNTAS:
1. ¿Qué deberíamos considerar respecto a las políticas de clientes sobre ausencia y días de vacaciones, y cómo estas pueden diferir de las políticas establecidas por la empresa?

2. En el caso de haber trabajado durante agosto, ¿cómo se suman los días extra de acuerdo sobre las vacaciones, y estos días adicionales afectan el balance general de días laborables?

3. ¿Cuál es el procedimiento detallado para seleccionar fechas de tiempo fuera del trabajo y qué criterios se utilizan para la aprobación de dichas solicitudes en Sesame Planner?
---
20
20
Attendance: Sesame Planner
⎼Paid ‘Absence Days’ are guaranteed as per 
your contract and our applicable policy
⎼23 Working Days Holiday entitlement + 2 
extra agreement days (August worked)
⎼Clients could have their own policies which 
might differ
How to book Time Off Work
✔Go to Planner in Sesame
✔Select your dates. 
✔Submit your request for approval

PREGUNTAS:
1. If an employee wants to take 'Undocumented Sick Leave' but has already taken 3 consecutive days earlier in the year, what steps should they follow to ensure compliance with the company policy on sick leave?

2. In the situation where an employee needs 'Documented Sick Leave,' what is the procedure they must follow regarding the notification of HR, and what is the time frame for doing so?

3. For an employee using the Sesame - Time off system to book sick leave, what specific steps should they follow to correctly match their official sick documentation with the requested dates?
---
21
21
Sick leave: Sick leave Requests
⎼Up to 4 ‘Undocumented Sick Leave’ days in 1 
full calendar year
⎼Not more than 3 consecutive days of 
‘Undocumented sick leave’
⎼In the case of a ‘Documented Sick Leave’, the 
employee must advise the HR Operations 
Team within 2 working days.
How to book Time Off Work
✔Go to Sesame- Time off
✔Select the dates you wish to post as a sick leave 
—same as ofﬁcial sick document.
✔Send request to your approver

PREGUNTAS:
1. How can I maximize my tax savings through the Edenred service platform's flexible retribution scheme, specifically considering the limits set on the Restaurant Card and Transport Card?

2. What are the specific benefits of the Kindergarten option within the flexible retribution scheme, given that it mentions "No exception limit," and how does it compare to the limits placed on the Restaurant and Transport Cards?

3. In the context of the Edenred service platform's benefit offerings, how do the monthly limits on the Restaurant Card and Transport Card contribute to the overall potential increase in my salary through the flexible retribution scheme?
---
24
Flexible Retribution
The scheme that will allow you to increase your salary
Shoot up your tax savings contracting some of their products. The 
Edenred service platform is set up with several beneﬁts that all 
Ciklumers can contract:
Restaurant Card
Up to €200 pm
Kindergarten
No exception limit
Transport Card
Up to €136.36 pm

PREGUNTAS:
1. How does the cost of including direct family members under my private medical insurance with Ciklum change after the first month?

2. If I choose to include only my spouse under the private medical insurance plan that Ciklum offers, how will the cost be managed and what is the monthly charge associated with it?

3. What are the specific insurance conditions and requirements for including direct family members, such as a spouse or children, under the private medical insurance plan provided by Ciklum?
---
25
Health Insurance
Your health, safety and wellbeing are top priorities for Ciklum
Ciklum pays the cost of your private medical insurance Mapfre.
Your direct family members —spouse and/or children— can also be 
included under the same conditions of no grace period or health 
questionnaire required. However, it is at your own cost for them, equal 
to 46.50€ pm/pp during the ﬁrst month and 45.74€ pm/pp starting 
from the second month.
The cost of your direct family members’ insurance will be deducted 
from your monthly salary.

32
32
Referral Program
For 2+ successful 
recommendations within a 
month - get 50% on top of the 
standard bonus
Friends at work make work better! 
All hot vacancies around our delivery locations globally are 
available at the Referral Portal - feel free to recommend your 
friends to Ciklum with no limits!

PREGUNTAS:
1. ¿Cuáles son las implicaciones de estar capacitado con datos hasta octubre de 2023 para la precisión y actualidad de las respuestas que puede proporcionar en situaciones que requieren información más reciente?
   
2. ¿Cómo garantiza el modelo mantenerse relevante y efectivo cuando se enfrenta a consultas sobre eventos o desarrollos que han ocurrido después de la fecha límite de entrenamiento en octubre de 2023?

3. ¿Qué sistemas o metodologías se podrían implementar para actualizar o complementar los conocimientos del modelo más allá de octubre de 2023, especialmente en industrias o temas que son altamente dinámicos y evolucionan rápidamente?
---
33
